Hero.description: Autodidacte depuis 2019, spécialisé Flutter mobile et Next.js web. Apps publiées sur Play Store & App Store. Du code à la production.

item0.description: Development and maintenance of Flutter mobile applications. Autonomous management of a complex client project — Flutter mobile architecture + C# backend integration. Delivered projects: Application & Miabé Hackathon Website.

item4.title: S Contact
item4.description: Instant contact sharing via QR code...
item4.fullDescription: Instant and contactless contact sharing. The application allows you to generate a dynamic QR code containing your professional information, allowing a direct and automatic save to the recipient's address book.

item5.title: EcoMap
item5.description: Collaborative mapping of dumpsites in Heat Map...
item5.fullDescription: A citizen ecological initiative for mapping wild dumpsites as a Heat Map. The application allows the population to easily report polluted areas via geolocation to assist local environmental organizations in waste management.

item6.title: I Fashion Wear

item6.fullDescription: Design of a modern and high-performance showcase site and management dashboard for an online sunglasses and eyewear shop, including inventory, product catalog, order management, and customer support.

item7.title: Make 10!
item7.description: Mathematical puzzle mobile game developed with Unity...
item7.fullDescription: A mathematical puzzle game developed solo in the Unity engine from scratch. The goal is to combine number blocks to reach the sum of 10. Includes over 300 levels with progressive difficulty. Successfully published on the Google Play Store.
